Version 5.4 - 6 Jun 2026 ARC RC Care SA Helper

ARC RC Care SA Helper

Did the client present a valid ID?

Which alternate method(s) used for ID (select all that apply)?

What is the type of event?

Did a resident or family member suffer severe injuries or death?

Did the client lose any pets during the event?

Where will the client shelter tonight or next few days?

Does the client have Home Insurance?

Does the client have Flood Insurance?

What is the status of the client's phone?

What is the status of the Client's vehicle?

Type of dwelling?

Damage Assessment Level?

What factors determined Destroyed for SFF or Apartment damage (select all that apply)?

What factors determined Destroyed for Mobile Home damage (select all that apply)?

What factors determined Major for SFF or Apartment damage (select all that apply)?

What factors determined Major for Mobile Home damage (select all that apply)?

What factors determined Minor assessment (select all that apply)?

What factors determined Affected assessment (select all that apply)?

What factors determined "Uninhabitable" assessment (select all that apply)?

Did the Client request Medical or Mental Health Services?

In generic terms, what drives the need for Medical or Mental Health Services (select all that apply)?

Did the Client request Spiritual Services?

In generic terms, what drives the need for Spiritual Services (select all that apply)?

Which referral materials or information did you provide to the client (select all that apply)?
